backend/main.mo: Main backend actor that includes blob storage and authorization mixins, defines comprehensive data types for vehicles, blog posts, promotions, testimonials, media assets, visitor tracking, and admin management.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module with placeholder structure for state migration between actor versions, currently performs no-op migration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to fixing frontend actor initialization in useActor.ts and stabilizing media asset deletion functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and layouts for the Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership application with admin panel and public-facing features.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file placeholder for global styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with public routes (home, vehicles, promos, blog, contact, credit simulation) and protected admin routes wrapped in AuthGuard, plus React Query and theme providers.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog form component for creating and editing admin users with name, email, principal ID fields, using mutations from useAdminUsers hook with loading states and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with edit and delete actions, prevents deletion of the last admin user, shows loading skeletons and empty states.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: Dialog component for selecting banner images from media assets filtered by filename containing 'banner'. Creates blob URLs from canister storage data and allows radio-button selection for main or CTA banner types.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: Form dialog for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields. Validates delegation identity token expiration before submission and handles both create and update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: Table component displaying all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions. Includes confirmation dialog for deletions and shows post title, date, and publication status.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: Grid component displaying media assets with thumbnails for images and file type icons for PDFs. Provides copy-to-clipboard for asset IDs and delete functionality with delegation identity validation and confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: Drag-and-drop file upload component supporting images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP up to 5MB) and PDFs (up to 10MB). Validates delegation identity, shows upload progress, and triggers cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses React hooks for form state management and mutation hooks for create/update operations.
Table component displaying all passenger vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with their periods, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes loading states, empty state, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and handles timestamp generation for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete actions. Includes loading skeletons and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Displays a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most visited pages with loading and empty states. Converts bigint data to chart format, truncates long URLs for display, and shows full URLs in tooltips.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days with loading and empty states. Converts bigint timestamp data to formatted dates and displays visitor counts chronologically.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if authentication is invalid or expired.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a list of 5 hardcoded recent articles with icons and navigation to individual blog post pages. Each article is a clickable button that navigates to the blog detail route.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with call, WhatsApp, credit simulation, and menu buttons. Includes a dropdown menu with site navigation links that closes on outside clicks.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Allows users to select a vehicle variant from a list of buttons. Automatically selects the first variant on mount and notifies parent component of selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a CTA banner image loaded from media assets or falls back to a static generated image. Creates blob URLs from canister storage data and handles loading states with skeleton.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Footer component with company info, contact details, social media links, and visitor statistics. Displays logo, address, phone, email, operating hours, and auto-refreshing visitor counts every 15 seconds.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero section that displays different titles, icons, backgrounds, and subtexts based on the current pathname. Supports routes for home, vehicle categories, promo, testimonials, blog, contact, and credit simulation.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Displays a carousel of up to 8 family vehicles from the catalog with loading state. Uses VehicleCard components within a responsive carousel layout.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles ('Mobil Niaga') fetched from vehicle catalogs, with loading state and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main banner image, loading it from media assets by filename or falling back to a static generated image, with blob URL management and error handling.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, and mobile hamburger menu that includes links to home, vehicle categories, promo, testimonials, blog, and contact pages.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Provides like and share buttons for a vehicle product, displaying counts and integrating with native share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicles ('Produk Unggulan') from the catalog with loading state.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search input component that redirects to the family vehicles page with a search query parameter when submitted.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section displaying three key features: flexible installments, low down payment, and negotiable pricing with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang as an official dealer with commitment to service and flexible financing.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive component for selecting vehicle variants and colors with button groups, managing selection state and notifying parent via callback.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, starting price, and detail link with formatted Indonesian currency.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and user feedback messages for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous and authenticated states.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics (vehicles, contacts, leads, visitors) that currently returns default zero values as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin user CRUD operations (get all, get by principal, create, update, delete) with authentication and network error handling, though backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete) with error handling and toast notifications, but backend methods are stubbed and not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, create, update, delete), returning empty/null data as backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form data with name, email, and message fields, though the backend method is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions, returning an empty array as the backend method is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data (vehicleId, amount, term), though the backend method is not implemented.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations, returning an empty array as the backend method is not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for media asset operations (get all, get by ID, upload) with comprehensive error handling for authentication, network, and canister errors, using stable storage backend methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for product interaction features (like count, share count, like action, share action) with a combined hook for convenience, though backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on promotions with authentication and network error handling. Currently returns stub implementations until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: Exports hooks for fetching vehicle catalog data and individual vehicle details. Returns empty arrays/null as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a single hook to fetch website settings using React Query. Currently returns null as backend implementation is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: Implements React Query hooks for testimonial CRUD operations with error classification for auth and network issues. Uses stub implementations pending backend development.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: Provides hooks for vehicle CRUD operations with enhanced error handling and query invalidation. Returns stub data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: Exports hooks for fetching visitor statistics, trends, and page views with configurable refetch intervals. Some endpoints are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated hook for visitor tracking that now defers to PublicLayout for actual tracking logic. Kept for backward compatibility only.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update website settings with comprehensive error handling. Currently uses stub implementations until backend is ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including sidebar, chart, and semantic color tokens.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile support, and logout functionality. Includes menu items for dashboard, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, media, leads, statistics, settings, and admin users.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes navbar, optional hero section, footer, and bottom CTA bar. Implements visitor tracking on page navigation using session IDs, device detection, and browser fingerprinting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
Admin user management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with list view and add/edit dialog that invalidates React Query cache on successful operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulation submissions from visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays a sortable table of contact form submissions from the website, showing name, email, message, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management page with upload zone and asset grid that invalidates React Query cache after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit functionality via dialog and a list component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via dialog and a list component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit/delete functionality, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard displaying visitor statistics with auto-refresh, including metrics cards, trend charts, and top pages analytics.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including contact info, social media URLs, and banner images with image picker dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, and automatic redirect to admin dashboard on successful login.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: banners, vehicle highlights, CTA, about, features, search, products, and articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article detail view, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for customer inquiries including vehicle interest, down payment, and tenor fields.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public vehicle detail page displaying vehicle info, variant/color selector, pricing, specifications, features, and interaction buttons.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public page listing passenger vehicles in a grid layout using VehicleCard components, showing up to 8 published vehicles.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Displays a grid of commercial vehicles filtered by category slug from URL params, showing up to 8 published vehicles using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Shows detailed commercial vehicle information with variant selector, price display, product interactions, and tabbed specifications/features sections.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page displaying three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page indicating the promotions section is under development.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates estimated monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor, then submits the simulation request.
Placeholder page indicating the testimonials section is under development.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for all domain entities (Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, CommercialVehicleCategory) matching backend types.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Provides utilities to convert MediaAsset Uint8Array blob data from canister storage into browser-displayable blob URLs and determine asset types from MIME types.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installments using an 8% annual interest rate based on vehicle price, down payment, and tenor.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides validation functions for common form inputs (required, email, phone, length, numeric, URL) and validates delegation identity expiration for authenticated operations.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Utility functions for visitor tracking including session ID generation/retrieval from localStorage, device type detection, browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking known issues with recurring actor availability errors, existing features for actor initialization and media deletion, and pending feature requests to resolve regression cycles.
